name: buddy-macos
description: macOS native desktop app with built-in Buddy Core

scripts.dist: pnpm build && pnpm clean:release && CUSTOM_DMGBUILD_PATH="$(sh scripts/prepare-dmgbuild.sh)" CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --publish never -c.mac.notarize=false
scripts.release:signed: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm clean:release && CUSTOM_DMGBUILD_PATH="$(sh scripts/prepare-dmgbuild.sh)" CSC_NAME="${CSC_NAME:-Developer ID Application}" electron-builder --mac --publish never -c.mac.forceCodeSigning=true
scripts.package:dir: pnpm build && pnpm clean:release && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --dir -c.mac.notarize=false
